meta.title: Credit Card Actual Size — Standard Card Dimensions on Screen
meta.description: See a standard credit card (85.60 × 53.98 mm) at its exact physical size on your screen. The ISO 7810 ID-1 format used worldwide.
meta.h1: Standard Credit Card — Actual Size on Screen
facts: Used by: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, driver's licenses, ID cards

meta.title: Business Card Actual Size — Standard US Business Card Dimensions
meta.description: See a standard US business card (88.9 × 50.8 mm) at its true physical size on screen. Essential reference for print designers.
meta.h1: Standard Business Card — Actual Size on Screen
facts: Print bleed area: typically +3mm all sides
